name: Patient 48
history: Relationship with Ivan for 7 years, married 3. Stressful periods during finals and wedding prep due to Ivan's lack of support. Current financial pressure: Ivan's part-time work, therapy costs, dental expenses.
unlovable_belief: I am a disappointment to his family
intermediate_belief: I have to manage everything alone because Ivan won't step up.
intermediate_belief_depression: Marriage means carrying all the burdens myself.
coping_strategies: Overfunctioning, resentment, conflict avoidance with in-laws.
situation: Ivan's mother speaks to patient in a critical manner.
auto_thought: "She blames me for our problems. She thinks I'm not good enough for her son."
behavior: Bites tongue, changes subject, complains to Ivan later who minimizes it.
